# Future Logix

> Future Logix Limited builds practical digital products and technology services for growing African organizations. Headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. Flagship product: SchoolsRep, a school operations platform for Nigerian private schools.

Future Logix is an implementation-focused technology company. We design, build, and operate systems for African organizations: schools, SMEs, professional services firms, service-led organizations, and product startups. Our work covers AI automation, custom web application development, AWS cloud architecture, and end-to-end business modernization. Every engagement is led by operators who run client delivery directly.

## Products

- [SchoolsRep](https://futurelogix.ng/schoolsrep): School operations platform for Nigerian private schools. Live and serving schools. External site: https://schoolsrep.com

## Services

- [AI Automation](https://futurelogix.ng/ai-automation): Workflow automation and AI integration for existing operations. From ₦2,500,000, 2–6 weeks.
- [Web Application Development](https://futurelogix.ng/web-application-development): Custom React/Next.js applications, internal tools, and customer-facing platforms. From ₦4,000,000, 4–12 weeks.
- [AWS Architecture & Implementation](https://futurelogix.ng/aws-architecture): Secure, scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS with cost optimization and operational readiness. From ₦3,000,000, 2–8 weeks.
- [Business Modernization](https://futurelogix.ng/business-modernization): Transform legacy processes into automated systems that scale. From ₦5,000,000, 4–16 weeks.
